mnemonics.title: Smoothing Techniques
mnemonics.content: SALAD: Smoothing Add-one (Laplace), Advanced (Good-Turing), Linear Interpolation, Absolute Discounting, Kneser-Ney

mnemonics.title: N-gram Order
mnemonics.content: Unigram: 1 word, Bigram: 2 words, Trigram: 3 words → U-B-T like University Building Tower

acronyms.usage: Handling unknown words in test data

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a 3-word frame moving through text like camera panning
Picture model's confusion level - lower values mean clearer understanding

analogies.analogy: Like guessing next song in playlist based on last few tracks
Similar to keeping spare change (probability mass) for unexpected expenses
